summary: Comprehensive testing of Cosmic Ledger integration, Homepage drag-and-drop rearrange fix, and Cosmic Mixer multi-select refactor. All 5 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features are working correctly: 1) Cosmic Ledger page at /cosmic-ledger with 4 tabs (Overview, Achievements, Legendary Paths, Leaderboard) - all APIs return correct data structure. 2) Cosmic Ledger button visible on Starseed Adventure page with Crown icon. 3) Homepage rearrange drag-and-drop working with 6 draggable widgets and Done button to exit edit mode. 4) Cosmic Mixer multi-select working for frequencies, sounds, and drones - shows 'X layered' text when multiple items selected. 5) Stop All button clears all layers correctly. 6) Mantra remains single-select as expected.

cosmic_ledger.GET /api/starseed/ledger: PASS - Returns stats (total_xp, max_level, unique_origins, gems, equipment, bosses_defeated, crafted_items, radiates) and achievements (earned list, definitions with 6 categories)
cosmic_ledger.GET /api/starseed/ledger/legendary-paths: PASS - Returns 7 legendary paths with progress tracking (gem requirements, unlock status)
cosmic_ledger.GET /api/starseed/leaderboard/realms: PASS - Returns 4 leaderboard categories (exploration, brightest_aura, most_helpful, first_to_enter)
cosmic_ledger.auth_required: PASS - All endpoints return 401/403 without authentication

achievement_definitions.categories: PASS - All 6 categories present (exploration, combat, crafting, community, story, mastery)
achievement_definitions.structure: PASS - All achievements have id, name, desc, icon, color, category fields

cosmic_ledger_page.title: PASS - 'Cosmic Ledger' title visible with achievement count
cosmic_ledger_page.tabs: PASS - All 4 tabs visible and clickable (Overview, Achievements, Legendary Paths, Leaderboard)
cosmic_ledger_page.overview_tab: PASS - Shows stats grid (Total XP, Max Level, Origins, Gems, Equipment, Bosses Slain, Crafted, Radiates), Active Origins badges, Recent Achievements
cosmic_ledger_page.leaderboard_tab: PASS - Shows Exploration Depth, Brightest Aura, Most Helpful, First to Enter sections

starseed_adventure.cosmic_ledger_button: PASS - Button with Crown icon and 'Cosmic Ledger' text visible at data-testid='cosmic-ledger-btn'

homepage_landing.edit_mode: PASS - 6 drag handles appear when edit mode active
homepage_landing.done_button: PASS - 'Done' button visible in edit mode, exits correctly
homepage_landing.widgets: PASS - Cosmic Mood Ring, Daily Wisdom, Continue Where You Left Off widgets present

cosmic_mixer.multi_select_frequencies: PASS - Can activate multiple frequencies (396 Hz + 528 Hz), shows '2 frequencies layered' text
cosmic_mixer.multi_select_sounds: PASS - Can activate multiple sounds (Rain + Ocean), shows '2 sounds layered' text
cosmic_mixer.multi_select_drones: PASS - Can activate multiple drones (Sitar + Tanpura), shows '2 instruments layered' text
cosmic_mixer.mantra_single_select: PASS - Mantra remains single-select (clicking new mantra replaces previous)
cosmic_mixer.stop_all: PASS - Stop All button clears all active layers
